meta.name: description
meta.content: Check out the schedule for Twin Cities Startup Week 2018
Check out the schedule for Twin Cities Startup Week 2018

meta.name: twitter:title
meta.content: Twin Cities Startup Week 2018 Schedule & Directory

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: See the full schedule of events happening Oct 4 - 13, 2018 and explore the directory of Speakers & Attendees.

div.div: This event has ended. Visit the official site or create your own event on Sched.

Remember! You will need to Snag a Twin Cities Startup Week Ticket in order register for events. Don’t worry, they are free! If an event is listed as "*EXTERNAL REGISTRATION REQUIRED*" you must visit that event’s external registration page to secure your spot.

a.href: https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=Check out Twin Cities Startup Week 2018 https://tcsw18.sched.com/ @tcstartupweek %23TCSW18 @sched

input.aria-label: Event link to copy and share

a.span: Mpls Jr Devs Pre-TCSW Happy Hour
Pre- TCSW Startup Weekend *External Registration Required*
Official Twin Cities Startup Week Opening Night Party
JUST ADDED: Scaling Within: Expand Your Internal Capacity to Sustain External Growth Session 1
Honest Studios (right next to Spyhouse North Loop)
MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley - Monday pass
The Time is Now! A conversation with Jeff Harmening, CEO and Chairman, General Mills, and NPR’s Kerri Miller. - Food Ag Ideas Week Kick off *External Registration Required*
The Lifecycle of a Brand: Building Stories that Start, Scale, Sustain, and Sell Businesses
Food | Ag | Ideas Week *External Registration Required*
Voice Is The New Playground For Brands
Free Co-working & Team Offices at Spaces
Free Co-working at Fueled Collective ( All Locations Open During TCSW )
Fueled Collective Locations ( See Descriptions for Addresses )
Free Co-working at Glen Nelson Center
Free Co-working at Impact Hub MSP
Free Co-working at Industrious ( Both Locations Open During TCSW )
Hemp, MN, and the Creation of a New Industry - Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required*
Scaling Within: Expand Your Internal Capacity to Sustain External Growth Session 2
Honest Studios (right next to Spyhouse North Loop)
Identifying Growth in Education Thru "Jobs to be Done"
Panel: The Future of Marketing in the Age of Machine Learning
By, For, With: Investing in Diversity
The fourth floor of Finnegan's new brew house
Maker to Market Demo Day hosted by the Good Acre and Lakewinds Coop - Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required
Thrivent Social Reverse Pitch Challenge *External Ticket Required*
Blockchain Isn’t Just For Finance *External Registration Required*
Tech Start-Ups: Getting the Legal Part Right
Impact Hub MSP -FINNOVATION Lab Collaboration, FINNEGANS House
Optimizing Product / Service Configuration with Systematic Innovation
Play the Odds: The Future and Impact of Sports Betting
Low-Cost Validation: What We've Learned From Helping 100+ Startups
Clustering the Twin Cities creative economy and innovation ecosystem along the Green Line
University Enterprise Labs Atrium - West Entrance
Diverse Thoughts, Inclusive Action - How to Change the Podcasting Landscape
5 THINGS ABOUT 5 THINGS Every Startup Should Know * External Registration Required*
The Power and Promise of a ReUSE Economy
How WE Built This- A Team Approach for Wonderly Software Solutions
Tech in St Paul, the Best Kept Secret in the Twin Cities
UEL Happy Hour with Surly Brewing
University Enterprise Labs Atrium - West Entrance
MN Cup Final Awards & Showcase - *External Registration Required*
Techstars Farm to Fork Demo Day *External Registration Required*
Building Light Weight Connected Environments – Quick and Easy Ways to Enable Cost-Effective VOC Early for Medical Devices in the Early Stages
MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley - Tuesday pass *External Registration Required*
Design as Disruptor: Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required*
FinTech Track Opening Keynote - Community building *External Ticket Required*
Loans, Financing, Advice & More: DEED's Programs for Entrepreneurs and Startup Businesses

Continued Rise of Small Food Brands - Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required*
Techstars Office Hours with Boulder MD Natty Zola *External Registration Required*
Regulatory Climate & Legal Considerations for Growing FinTech Companies: Current State & Future Trends *External Registration Required*
Growing Startup Cultures in Marketing and Sales
Land O’Lakes Minneapolis Meeting Center, TractorWorks Building (2nd floor)
The Best Product You've Never Heard of . . . How to get your Story out in the Changing Media Landscape
The Power of Your Personal Brand - Red Bull Athlete and Artist Workshop & Tell-all
Scaling Company Culture as you and your Business Grow
Build your app already!! Why learning to code is *the best* first step to launching your app idea [Panel & Pizza]
Venture capital 101: Confessions of a VC
Bunker Labs North Muster *External Registration Required*
GlitchCon | Digital Games Festival *External Registration Required*
P is for Partnership: A Discussion on how Corporations are Partnering with Startups *External Registration Required*
Unconscious Bias: Nip it in the Bud
OKR and KPI Workshop / Techstars AMA with Alumni
Game Changers Track - MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley *External Registration Required*
Lessons from Global Marketplace Track - MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley *External Registration Required*
The Consumerization of Health Track Session - MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley *External Registration Required*
The Disruption of Convergence Track - MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley *External Registration Required*
Serving the Service Industry: How Kipsu Learns Customer Success from the Pros
Unique Challenges and Opportunities of a Healthcare Startup
Funding - What do investors looks for? *External Registration Required*
Ag Innovation and Craft Brewing - Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required*
And you thought only you could be Smart! Smart Cities and Communities are changing the way people will live, work, play and thrive in the coming decades. Its time to ride that wave.
The Hard Road with The Stable and Gen7 Investments
What's Best For YOU? Startups, Corporate, or Both? *External Registration Required*
Raising capital: It can’t be that hard… Right?
Tap the Power of Communities: Creating & Inventing in Your Neighborhood
Intellectual Property on Tap: Start Up Edition
Crash the Networks Happy Hour hosted by Grow North - Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required*
Beta Showcase - Featuring the Area's Top Up-and-Coming Startups *External Registration Required*
TECHdotMN /PLAY + VOXEL VIRTUAL REALITY ARCADE *External Registration Required*
Keeping the Diverse in IT: A Lesson in Employee Retention *External Ticket Required*
Growing Minnesota - We Grow Businesses not Just Crops *External Registration Required*
Caffeine and Speed-Networking For Women and Non-Binary People Changing the World
MANOVA Global Summit on the Future of Health in Medical Alley - Wednesday Pass *External Registration Required*
The Advantages of Being at a Disadvantage: An Inside Look how Small Businesses can Utilize Government Procurement Diversity Opportunities as a Means to Scale.
How to Land a Big Fish: Pitching to Fortune 500 Financial Services *External Registration Required*
Building Mission Driven Brands - Food Ag Ideas Week *External Registration Required*

Technology Transfer: Tech’s Best Kept Secret (Lightning Talk)
Extraordinary Service as a Competitive Advantage
Smart Strategies to Start a Product-Focused Business

Protecting Your IP and Preparing for Financing
Digital Transformation: Fireside chat Bremer Bank and GoKart Labs *External Registration Required*
Sprint Before You Hack: A Story Sprint Workshop to Prepare You For Successful Growth Hacking
Global Student Entrepreneur Awards Regional Finals
Schulze Hall Auditorium @ the University of St. Thomas in Downtown Minneapolis
From Crowdfunding to ICOs: Tips for Creatively (and Legally) Financing Your Business Using the Internet
The Best from the Midwest - Discussion between Accelerator Leaders *External Registration Required*
Digital Innovation at a Health System
Initial Crowd Offering (ICO) : Going Public Using Investment Crowdfunding
When to Hire a CFO for your Fast-Growth Business
Pitchfest in the Midwest *External Registration Required*
How to Measure Customer Success at Your Startup [Panel Discussion]
3rd Floor of the N Grain Exchange building (1 floor below Fueled Collective co-working space)- HAAF...
Million Dollar Challenge for Minority Entrepreneurs
$10 Million of Tax-Free Small Biz Income & Other Things You Should Know
Pitch, Please- The Ultimate Idea Competition!
Opening Reception - MedCity INVEST Twin Cities

West Bank Auditorium in Wiley Hall, Room 20
The Future of Immersive Experiences - Panel Discussion
Power of 100 MSP Pitchfest *External Registration Required*
Technovation[MN] Mentor Happy Hour *External Registration Required*
Venture-Scale Apps: A Panel of MN's Funded Mobile-Centric Startups

Leading With Purpose: Exploring Business Structures for Mission-Driven Companies
Impact Hub MSP, 4th Floor, Training Room
Beta /Backers - (Invite Only) Curated Meetings Between Early Stage Investors & Emerging Minnesota-based Startups

Coffee & Closers :: Sales Challenges Solved LIVE
Office Hours with Sofia Fund *External Registration Required*

Next to the SCSU Welcome Center

Macalester College Leonard Center, Schall Family Atrium
